internal_documents.content: Order ORD-JAD-090 ships lab equipment to Jade University in Texas on 2026-06-28.
Master certificate warning WARN-JAD-090 says older Jade certificates were stale and exemption status must be verified.
Exemption authority CERT-JAD-090 covers Jade University, Texas ship-to, lab equipment category, current state-approved exemption certificate TX-44, and sale date 2026-06-28 before sale.
